issues: compute_signal logic uses recent_change > prior_4wk_avg + 0.05 for entry but spec requires 'weekly change exceeds 5% above prior 4-week average' (5% absolute, not relative to prior_4wk_avg)
exit condition uses recent_change < prior_4wk_avg + 0.02 but spec requires 'weekly change falls below 2% above prior 4-week average' (2% absolute, not relative to prior_4wk_avg)
compute_signal uses pct_change() on 'value' but spec implies weekly change in electricity demand which should be compared to prior 4-week average of demand, not pct_change of pct_change
indentation errors in compute_signal method cause logic errors
